inputs.label: Batch Size (g)
inputs.businessContext: Production batch size in grams, typical lab scale is 1000g.

businessContext_i18n.en: Production batch size in grams, typical lab scale is 1000g.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gram cinsinden üretim parti büyüklüğü, tipik laboratuvar ölçeği 1000g'dir.

inputs.label: Unit Weight (g)
inputs.businessContext: Weight per finished product unit (e.g., a foundation is 30g, a lipstick 4g).

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight per finished product unit (e.g., a foundation is 30g, a lipstick 4g).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş ürün birimi başına ağırlık (örneğin, bir fondöten 30g, bir ruj 4g).

inputs.label: Material Cost per Gram
inputs.businessContext: Average bulk raw material cost per gram including all ingredients.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average bulk raw material cost per gram including all ingredients.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tüm bileşenler dahil gram başına ortalama toplu hammadde maliyeti.

inputs.label: Container Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Packaging and container cost per finished product unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Packaging and container cost per finished product unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş ürün birimi başına ambalaj ve kap maliyeti.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor cost allocated per finished product unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct labor cost allocated per finished product unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş ürün birimi başına tahsis edilen doğrudan işçilik maliyeti.

inputs.label: Overhead (%)
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturing overhead as a percentage of total direct cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturing overhead as a percentage of total direct cost.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam doğrudan maliyetin yüzdesi olarak üretim genel gideri.

inputs.label: Desired Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Profit margin markup on total cost per unit to determine selling price.

businessContext_i18n.en: Profit margin markup on total cost per unit to determine selling price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satış fiyatını belirlemek için birim başına toplam maliyet üzerine kâr marjı.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
